BriefArtistIntroEnglish: British singer-songwriter with a sultry, commanding voice. She broke through in 2020 with the deep house-pop hit "WTF" (with Hugel), which surpassed 250 million streams globally. Her debut solo single "Kids In The Corner" was featured as the opening track for Netflix's Cursed in 2020. Her music blends dance-pop with empowering lyrics about female confidence and self-acceptance.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 英国创作型女歌手，嗓音性感撩人、极具辨识度。2020年与法国DJ Hugel合作Deep House流行单曲《WTF》全球播放量超2.5亿次。首支个人单曲《Kids In The Corner》同年被Netflix剧集《天命之咒》选为开场曲。音乐风格融合舞曲流行与女性赋权主题，充满力量感。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese gufeng (ancient-style) singer recognized for his deep, resonant baritone and expressive falsetto that can deliver both male and female operatic roles. He released his debut original album Qing·Jie in 2014. Since the mid-2010s, he has contributed theme songs for the hit game Jianwang 3 and the Daomu Biji franchise, building a strong following in the fantasy music scene.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国古风男歌手，嗓音低沉浑厚、磁性温柔，假声可演绎女声或戏腔。2014年发行首张原创古风专辑《情·捷》。2010年代中期起为游戏《剑网3》和《盗墓笔记》IP献唱主题曲，在玄幻音乐圈内拥有较高知名度。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Filipino-American singer and social media personality. Her voice is breathy and playful, with a distinctive charisma. She rose to fame in August 2020 after posting the most-liked video on TikTok. She released her debut single "Build a Bitch" in 2021 — an alt-pop/electronic track with dark trap influences that critiques unrealistic beauty standards — which charted on the Billboard Hot 100.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 菲裔美国歌手及社交媒体红人，嗓音慵懒轻快、极具辨识度。2020年8月在TikTok发布对嘴视频后一举成名。2021年发行首支单曲《Build a Bitch》——一首融合另类流行、电子与暗黑陷阱元素的歌曲，批判不切实际的审美标准——成功打入Billboard Hot 100。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American actor and filmmaker. For A Star Is Born (2018), underwent 18 months of vocal training. Worked with dialect coach to lower speaking voice by an octave. Vocals performed live on set, described as a patchwork of rock, country, and soul influences.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国演员、导演。为出演《一个明星的诞生》（2018）接受了长达18个月的声乐训练，并与方言教练合作将说话声线降低了一个八度。片中所有演唱均为现场录制，嗓音带有摇滚、乡村和灵魂乐的混合质感。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American pop icon. His three-octave tenor range and vintage showmanship draw from funk, R&B, and soul traditions. He released his debut album Doo-Wops & Hooligans in 2010. He has sold over 200 million records worldwide, won 15 Grammy Awards, and scored global hits including "Uptown Funk" (2014) and "Leave the Door Open" (2021). His live performances are legendary for their electrifying energy.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国流行乐标志性人物，拥有三个八度的男高音音域，复古舞台表现力极强，音乐扎根于放克、R&B与灵魂乐传统。2010年发行首张专辑《Doo-Wops & Hooligans》，全球唱片销量超2亿张，斩获15座格莱美奖，代表作包括《Uptown Funk》（2014）和《Leave the Door Open》（2021）。现场演出以充满活力的舞台能量闻名于世。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: British pop experimentalist. Her music sits at the intersection of glossy pop hooks, club culture, and restless electronic production. She co-wrote and featured on Icona Pop's "I Love It" in 2012, which topped the UK charts. She released her debut album True Romance in 2013 and later defined the hyperpop genre with Pop 2 (2017) and Charli (2019). Her forward-thinking production has influenced a generation of pop artists.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 英国流行音乐实验者，音乐游走于华丽流行旋律、俱乐部文化与不断革新的电子制作之间。2012年参与创作并献声Icona Pop的《I Love It》而崭露头角，2013年发行首张专辑《True Romance》。此后以《Pop 2》（2017）和《Charli》（2019）定义了超流行风格，以前瞻性的制作理念影响了一代流行音乐人。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Grammy-nominated American singer-songwriter. His voice is warm and raspy, balancing youthful energy with emotional depth. His track "Not Angry" went viral in 2020, amassing over 5 billion views across social platforms in Asia. He co-wrote BTS's "Life Goes On" (2020), which hit No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100. Critics often describe his songwriting as "emotional diary" pop.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 获格莱美提名的美国创作型歌手，嗓音温暖沙哑，兼具少年感与情感深度。2020年代表作《Not Angry》在亚洲社交平台走红，话题播放量超50亿次。同年参与创作BTS的《Life Goes On》，该曲登顶Billboard Hot 100。创作风格被乐评人形容为情感日记"式的流行音乐。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese Mandopop singer-songwriter. His music revolves around clean piano-driven balladry, restrained romanticism, and emotionally resonant melodies. He made his debut in August 2014 with the self-composed hit "The Distance of Love", which became the ending theme for the hit drama The Way We Were. He has since become one of the most streamed Mandopop artists of the 2010s and 2020s, known for his gentle vocal delivery.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型华语流行歌手，音乐以干净的钢琴抒情旋律、克制的浪漫主义与真挚的情感共鸣为特征。2014年8月以自创曲《以后别做朋友》出道，该曲成为台剧《十六个夏天》片尾曲。此后成为2010至2020年代流媒体播放量最高的华语歌手之一，声线温柔细腻。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese pop singer. Her voice is ethereal and piercing, balancing rock grit with electronic dreaminess. She rose to fame in 2002 as the lead vocalist of F.I.R., scoring massive hits like "Lydia", "Our Love", and "Crescent Bay". After leaving the band in 2018, she launched a solo career exploring electronica and world music. Her 2022 theme song "Jue Ai" for the drama Love Between Fairy and Devil became a viral sensation across Asia.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾流行女歌手，嗓音空灵而富有穿透力，兼具摇滚的爆发力与电子音乐的迷离感。2002年以飞儿乐团（F.I.R.）主唱出道，《Lydia》、《我们的爱》、《月牙湾》等经典红遍华语乐坛。2018年单飞后推出个人专辑，探索电子与世界音乐。2022年为电视剧《苍兰诀》演唱的主题曲《诀爱》在亚洲范围内引发热潮。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer-songwriter. Her voice is a powerhouse — wide-ranging, technically precise, and emotionally charged. She rose to prominence at 16 in 2008 and became the youngest artist to hold solo concerts at the Hong Kong Coliseum at 19 in 2011. Her autobiographical songwriting moves from intimate piano ballads to arena-sized pop anthems. Hits include "Bubble" (2012) and "Light Years Away" (2016).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港创作型女歌手，拥有一副极具爆发力的嗓音，音域宽广、技术精准且情感充沛。2008年16岁出道，2011年19岁在香港红磡体育馆举办个唱，创下最年轻歌手记录。创作上坚持自传式表达，音乐既能细腻深情亦能大气磅礴。代表作包括深情R&B抒情曲《泡沫》（2012）和电影感流行金曲《光年之外》（2016）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rock band founded in 2004. Their sound is built on bright guitar energy, youthful urgency, and choruses designed for stadium shouting. Their breakout single "Young for You" (2004) — sung in intentionally broken English — became an anthem for indie rock fans. Their 2011 track "Chasing Dreams with a Pure Heart" remains one of the most recognizable Chinese rock songs, widely adopted as an inspirational anthem.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国摇滚乐队，成立于2004年，音乐以明亮的吉他能量、青春的张力和适合大合唱的副歌见长。2004年以故意使用不标准英语发音的《Young for You》走红，成为独立摇滚乐迷的经典之作。2011年的《追梦赤子心》被广泛用作励志歌曲，至今仍是最具辨识度的华语摇滚歌曲之一。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: French DJ and producer. His style is rooted in deep house and Afro-house, featuring driving percussion, melodic synth hooks, and Latin-infused rhythms. He rose to international fame in 2020 with the hit "WTF" (feat. Amber Van Day), which amassed over 250 million streams. He has collaborated with Topic, Armin van Buuren, and Tom Enzy, and performs regularly on the global electronic music festival circuit.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 法国DJ及唱片制作人，音乐扎根于Deep House和Afro-House，以强劲的打击乐、旋律性合成器钩子和拉丁律动为特征。2020年与Amber Van Day合作的《WTF》全球播放量超2.5亿次，使其一举成名。曾与Topic、Armin van Buuren等艺术家合作，活跃于全球电子音乐节舞台。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese musical group associated with the massively popular MMORPG Jianwang 3 (JX3). Active since the mid-2010s, they produce character-themed songs and storyline-driven tracks that blend gufeng (ancient-style) melodies with modern pop production. They are part of JX3's broader strategy of building a multimedia entertainment universe around the game's rich world-building.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国音乐组合，与热门大型多人在线角色扮演游戏《剑网3》深度关联。自2010年代中期起活跃，创作角色主题曲及剧情驱动型歌曲，融合古风旋律与现代流行制作，是《剑网3》围绕其丰富世界观构建多媒体娱乐版图的重要组成部分。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper born and raised in Fuzhou. His delivery is plainspoken and grounded, with introspective lyricism at its core. He made his debut with a mixtape in 2013 and gained widespread attention through his participation in The Rap of China in 2017. His music frequently reflects on personal struggle, growth, and the realities of urban life in contemporary China.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手，生于福建福州，说唱风格平实沉稳，歌词以自省式表达见长。2013年通过混音带出道，2017年因参加《中国有嘻哈》而获得广泛关注。音乐常反思个人挣扎、成长经历及当代中国都市生活的现实。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American pop icon. Her career is defined by constant image reinvention, theatrical spectacle, and the ability to turn vulnerability into grand performance art. She released her debut album The Fame in 2008 and has won 13 Grammy Awards and an Academy Award for Best Original Song ("Shallow" from A Star Is Born, 2018). Her hits include "Bad Romance" (2009), "Poker Face" (2008), and "Born This Way" (2011).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国流行文化标志性人物，以不断重塑形象、戏剧化的舞台表现和将脆弱转化为宏大表演艺术的能力闻名于世。2008年发行首张专辑《The Fame》，斩获13座格莱美奖及2018年奥斯卡最佳原创歌曲奖（《一个明星的诞生》插曲《Shallow》）。代表作包括《Bad Romance》（2009）、《Poker Face》（2008）和《Born This Way》（2011）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Icelandic-Chinese singer-songwriter who has reimagined jazz-pop for a new generation. Her music draws from jazz harmonies, classical training, and old-romance warmth, all filtered through a contemporary lens. She began performing as a cello soloist with the Iceland Symphony Orchestra at 15. Her albums Everything I Know About Love (2022) and Bewitched (2023) have garnered critical acclaim and a devoted Gen Z following.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 冰岛籍华裔创作型歌手，以爵士流行风格重新定义当代音乐，音乐融合爵士和声、古典训练背景与怀旧浪漫气息。15岁时便作为大提琴独奏家与冰岛交响乐团合作演出。专辑《Everything I Know About Love》（2022）和《Bewitched》（2023）获得乐评界广泛赞誉，在Z世代中拥有大量忠实听众。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Norwegian musical duo of rappers and producers. Their music crosses hip-hop, pop, reggae, and soul, and their stage presence is famously energetic. They achieved international fame in 2007 with their interpolation of The Four Seasons' "Beggin'", which became a multi-platinum global hit. They have released eight studio albums as of 2018.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 挪威音乐双人组，由说唱歌手兼制作人组成，音乐横跨嘻哈、流行、雷鬼与灵魂乐，舞台表现以充满活力闻名。2007年凭借翻唱改编自The Four Seasons的《Beggin'》享誉国际，该曲在全球多国获得多白金认证。截至2018年已发行八张录音室专辑。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American singer-songwriter with roots in gospel and R&B. His voice carries both power and emotional nuance, making him a sought-after featured vocalist. He is best known for his work on Macklemore & Ryan Lewis's "Can't Hold Us" (2013 — No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100) and "Same Love", as well as David Guetta's "Lovers on the Sun" (2014). His solo material draws from soul, pop, and gospel traditions.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国创作型歌手，出道前为福音和R&B歌手，嗓音兼具力量与情感深度。以在多首电子及流行大热单曲中的合作演唱而闻名，包括Macklemore & Ryan Lewis的《Can't Hold Us》（2013，Billboard Hot 100冠军）和David Guetta的《Lovers on the Sun》（2014）。个人作品融合灵魂乐、流行与福音音乐元素。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese girl group formed in 2001, consisting of Selina Jen, Hebe Tien, and Ella Chen. Their vocal chemistry, bright pop melodies, and warm, relatable image have made them one of the most iconic and long-running Mandopop groups. They have released over 10 studio albums with classic hits including "Super Star" (2003) and "Ring Ring Ring" (2006), defining a generation of Mandopop listeners.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾女子组合，成立于2001年，成员包括Selina、Hebe和Ella。和声默契、旋律明亮活泼，形象亲切温暖，是华语乐坛最具标志性和最长青的女子团体之一。发行超过10张录音室专辑，经典金曲包括《Super Star》（2003）和《Ring Ring Ring》（2006），代表了一代华语流行乐听众的集体记忆。

Role: online music creator and self-media blogger
BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese online music creator active on Bilibili and NetEase Cloud Music since the mid-2010s. He produces covers and original compositions in the gufeng (ancient-style) genre, frequently drawing from Chinese historical themes, wuxia aesthetics, and video game soundtracks. He has contributed to official Jianwang 3 music projects and connects with his fanbase through music production tutorials and community interaction.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国线上音乐创作者，自2010年代中期起活跃于Bilibili和网易云音乐平台。擅长古风翻唱及原创作品，创作常取材于中国历史主题、武侠美学及电子游戏配乐。曾参与《剑网3》官方音乐项目，通过音乐制作教程和社区互动与忠实粉丝群体保持紧密联系。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American producer and songwriter. His work is melody-driven and versatile, spanning indie-pop, dance, and commercial pop since the late 2010s. He has earned a reputation for clean production and an ear for memorable hooks, making him a reliable behind-the-scenes creator in the contemporary music landscape.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国制作人及词曲作者，自2010年代末期起从事旋律驱动的流行与电子音乐制作，风格横跨独立流行、舞曲及商业流行。制作风格干净利落，对抓耳旋律有着敏锐的嗅觉，在当代音乐行业中积累了良好的幕后创作者口碑。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American singer-songwriter and producer. His music is dark, theatrical pop with immersive visual worldbuilding. His 2019 breakout single "Cradles" went viral on TikTok and has since amassed over 1 billion streams, establishing him as a leading figure in the dark-pop genre. His sound blends electronic production, haunting melodies, and unsettling yet catchy subject matter.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国创作型歌手及制作人，音乐风格偏向暗黑戏剧化的流行乐，视觉构建极具沉浸感。2019年凭借单曲《Cradles》在TikTok走红，至今播放量超10亿次，确立了他在暗黑流行领域的先锋地位。其音乐融合电子制作、萦绕心头的旋律与不安但极具吸引力的主题。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter (born Lü Jianzhong). His music is defined by emotionally charged R&B ballads and a powerful tenor voice. He rose to fame in the mid-2000s with hits like "Fighting Love" and "I Can't Say", staples of Taiwanese Mandopop. His songs often explore heartbreak, longing, and personal struggle. Despite health challenges, he has maintained a dedicated fanbase for over two decades.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手（本名吕建忠），擅长情感充沛的R&B情歌，拥有一副富有力量的男高音。2000年代中期凭借《斗鱼》和《说不出の爱》等金曲走红，成为台湾华语流行乐的标志性作品。其音乐常围绕心碎、思念与个人挣扎的主题。尽管曾受健康问题困扰，二十年来依然拥有一批忠实的歌迷。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2009. They built a reputation for experimental, genre-defying music that blends electro-pop, house, R&B, and avant-garde elements. Often cited as one of the most influential K-pop groups of the 2010s, the group consisted of Victoria, Amber, Luna, Sulli, and Krystal. Though on indefinite hiatus, their music continues to shape contemporary K-pop.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 韩国女子组合，2009年由SM娱乐推出，音乐以实验性和打破常规见长，融合电子流行、浩室、R&B及先锋元素，被公认为2010年代最具影响力的K-pop组合之一。成员包括Victoria、Amber、Luna、Sulli和Krystal。尽管已无限期停止活动，其音乐依然深刻影响着当代K-pop。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and performer. His vocal timbre is distinctive and emotionally expressive, and he first gained attention in the 2010s through major Chinese music competition shows. His powerful stage presence and unconventional techniques drew praise. His repertoire spans Mandopop ballads, rock-infused tracks, and experimental pieces that showcase his artistic range.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及表演者，嗓音质感独特、情感表达充沛。2010年代通过参与中国大型音乐竞演节目而崭露头角，其强大的舞台表现力和非传统的演唱技巧获得广泛好评。作品涵盖华语抒情、摇滚风格及实验性曲目，展现其多元的艺术表现力。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer based in Taiwan. Her voice is wide-ranging and powerful, making her one of the most sought-after voices for television drama soundtracks. Since her debut in 2007, she has built a career on emotive ballad renditions. Her hits include "I Love Him" (2009) and "Can't Let Go" (2010), celebrated for their heartfelt delivery and technical control.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国女歌手，活跃于台湾，音域宽广、嗓音极具爆发力，是电视剧原声带最炙手可热的歌手之一。2007年出道以来，凭借情感充沛的抒情演唱建立了坚实的音乐事业。代表作包括《我爱他》（2009）和《放不下》（2010），演唱真挚动人、技术控制扎实。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer prominent in the online music and gufeng scene since the mid-2010s. Her voice is ethereal and crisp, and she moves easily across genres. She has built a large following on Bilibili and NetEase Cloud Music, frequently collaborating with other online musicians and contributing to game soundtracks, animated series, and fantasy fan projects.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代中期起活跃于线上音乐及古风音乐圈。嗓音空灵清亮，跨风格驾驭能力强，在Bilibili和网易云音乐等平台上拥有大量粉丝。常与其他线上音乐人合作，为游戏、动画及玄幻仙侠类粉丝项目贡献了大量原创配乐。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rock band formed in 2004. Their sound is melancholic yet hopeful, blending indie rock, folk, and post-rock textures. Their lyrics often evoke imagery of travel, loneliness, and the passage of time, resonating deeply with younger urban listeners. They have become one of the most beloved indie bands on the live music circuit, known for intimate yet emotionally expansive performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国摇滚乐队，成立于2004年，音乐风格忧郁而充满希望，融合独立摇滚、民谣和后摇滚元素。歌词常唤起关于旅途、孤独与时间流逝的意象，深刻共鸣于年轻都市听众。是独立音乐现场最受喜爱的乐队之一，现场演出私密而情感宽广。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: China Chao Yin is a music variety show co-produced by Kugou Music and Youku. First season aired Nov 2021 – Jan 2022. Features 5 music directors and 41 groups spanning electronic, guofeng, folk, rap, rock, and opera. Not a band.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 《中国潮音》是由酷狗音乐和优酷联合出品的国潮音乐竞演真人秀节目，2021年11月至2022年1月播出第一季。集结41组横跨电音、国风、说唱、摇滚、戏曲等领域的音乐人。并非乐队。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer, songwriter, and musician. Her sound is guitar-driven pop-rock with powerful vocal delivery. A classically trained pianist who later took up guitar, she released her debut album in 2014 and gained wide recognition through the film The Ex-Files 3: The Return of the Exes (2017) and its hit theme song "Bodyshame". Her music blends Mandopop with rock, electronic, and R&B influences.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手、词曲作者及音乐人，音乐以吉他驱动的流行摇滚为主线，演唱充满力量感。自幼学习钢琴后转攻吉他，2014年发行首张专辑，2017年因电影《前任3：再见前任》及其主题曲《体面》而广为人知。其音乐融合华语流行与摇滚、电子、R&B元素。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and rapper. Her stage presence is bold and energetic, and her style spans hip-hop, pop, and electronic music. She gained prominence in 2020 through Rap for Youth, where her confident delivery and catchy hooks won over a wide audience. Her music often touches on self-expression, ambition, and youthful defiance.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及说唱歌手，舞台表现大胆而充满活力，风格横跨嘻哈、流行与电子音乐。2020年通过参与《说唱新世代》崭露头角，其自信的表达和抓耳的旋律吸引了广泛受众。音乐常围绕自我表达、野心与青春叛逆的主题。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese rock band formed in 1997, often called "the Beatles of the Chinese-speaking world". Their music features stadium anthems, direct choruses, and lyrics that capture the emotional landscape of youth, memory, and communal release. They have won multiple Golden Melody Awards for Best Band since the 2000s and have released over a dozen albums. Their live concerts are legendary for their emotional intensity and audience participation.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾摇滚乐队，成立于1997年，被誉为华语世界的披头士"。音乐以体育场级别的摇滚颂歌、直接有力的副歌和捕捉青春、记忆与集体情感释放的歌词见长。2000年代以来多次获得金曲奖最佳乐团奖，发行专辑十余张。现场演唱会以情感强度极高和观众深度参与闻名于世。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter and lead vocalist of Mayday since 1997. His voice has a distinctive, slightly nasal warmth that is instantly recognizable across Mandopop. As the band's primary lyricist since the late 1990s, his writing is deeply nostalgic, introspective, and attuned to the emotional rhythms of growing up, love, and loss. Beyond Mayday, he has pursued solo projects under the moniker "Ashin x".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手，传奇乐队五月天自1997年成立以来的主唱。嗓音带有独特的、略带鼻音的温暖质感，在华语乐坛极具辨识度。作为乐队自1990年代末期起的主要词作者，歌词充满怀旧、内省色彩，精准捕捉成长、爱与失落的情感节律。除乐队活动外，也以阿信 x"的名义进行个人创作与合作项目。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the gufeng and fantasy music genres since the 2010s. His voice is clear and emotionally expressive, well-suited to the dramatic, melancholic tone of wuxia and xianxia storytelling. He frequently collaborates with the online music community, contributing vocal performances to game soundtracks, character songs, and fan projects.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于古风与玄幻音乐领域。嗓音清亮而富有情感层次，善于诠释武侠与仙侠题材所需的戏剧性和忧郁氛围。是线上音乐社区的活跃合作者，为游戏配乐、角色歌曲及粉丝项目贡献了大量演唱作品。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and online music creator active in the gufeng and pop crossover scene since the mid-2010s. His voice is gentle and fluid, and he has released both original tracks and covers that resonate with fans of Chinese fantasy aesthetics. His work draws from historical themes, classical poetry, and traditional Chinese musical motifs, reinterpreted through modern production.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及线上音乐创作者，自2010年代中期起活跃于古风与流行跨界领域。嗓音温柔流畅，曾发布原创及翻唱作品，深受中国玄幻美学爱好者喜爱。其创作常取材于历史主题、古典诗词及传统音乐元素，并通过现代制作手法进行重新诠释。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and producer. His music is smooth R&B-infused Mandopop, with warm, soulful vocals and sleek production. Since his debut in the mid-2010s, he has built a dedicated following through independent releases, establishing himself as a key figure in China's emerging R&B and soul scene.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及制作人，自2010年代中期出道以来，以融入R&B元素的华语流行风格见长。音乐温暖深情、制作流畅精致，歌词探索爱情与现代关系的复杂性。通过独立发行和线上平台积累了忠实听众，已成为中国新兴R&B与灵魂乐场景的重要人物。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese rock band formed in 2003. Their sound is energetic pop-rock with catchy hooks and anthemic choruses. They entered the mainstream in the late 2000s with support from Mayday and later developed a distinct identity with hits like "The Last 831" (2014) and "Stay at Home" (2019). Their music is youthful, celebratory, and tinged with nostalgic sentiment.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾摇滚乐队，成立于2003年，音乐充满活力的流行摇滚风格，旋律抓耳、副歌适合大合唱。2000年代末在五月天的支持下进入主流视野，后以《最后的831》（2014）和《想见你想见你想见你》（2019）等金曲确立独立风格。音乐充满青春气息、欢快明亮，常带怀旧色彩。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and lead vocalist of 831 since its founding in 2003. His voice is raw and emotive, and his stage presence is energetic. As the band's primary songwriter, he crafts lyrics that capture the intensity of youth, love, and defiance. His vocal texture conveys vulnerability and strength in equal measure.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，摇滚乐队八三夭（831）自2003年成立以来的主唱。嗓音原始粗犷、情感充沛，舞台表现充满活力。作为乐队主要词曲作者，歌词捕捉了青春的激烈、爱与叛逆。嗓音具有独特的质感，脆弱与力量并存。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2021. Her music features a powerful, emotionally resonant vocal style and personal, confessional lyrics. She draws from pop, folk, and electronic influences to create a sound that is both contemporary and introspective.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2021年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。音乐以极具力量感的情感嗓音和个人化的自白式歌词为特征。融合流行、民谣与电子元素，创造出既具当代感又充满内省的音乐风格。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese musical duo formed in 1998, consisting of female vocalist Yangwei Linghua and male rapper Zeng Yi. One of China's most commercially successful pop acts, they are known for their high-energy, folk-infused pop that blends traditional Chinese melodies with modern electronic beats and hip-hop elements. Hits include "The Most Dazzling National Style" (2009) and "Moonlight on the Lotus Pond" (2010).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国音乐组合，成立于1998年，由女主唱杨魏玲花和男说唱曾毅组成。中国最具商业价值的流行组合之一，音乐高能量、融入民族元素，将传统中国旋律与现代电子节拍及嘻哈元素相结合。代表作包括《最炫民族风》（2009）和《荷塘月色》（2010）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in the late 2010s. Her voice is warm and emotive, with accessible Mandopop melodies. She has built a steady following through live performances and streaming platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代末因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音温暖感性，旋律易入耳，此后通过现场演出和流媒体平台积累了稳定的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame after finishing among the top five on Super Girl in 2009. Her voice is clean and pure, and her style is emotive balladry. She has released multiple albums and contributed extensively to television drama soundtracks. Hits include "I'm Just a Child" and numerous theme songs for popular Chinese dramas.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2009年因在《快乐女声》中获得全国五强而走红。嗓音干净清纯，演绎抒情歌曲时情感充沛，已发行多张专辑并为多部热播电视剧演唱主题曲。代表作包括《我很快乐》及多部电视剧主题曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese game company behind the massively popular MMORPG Jianwang 3, first released in 2009. The game has since expanded into a multimedia entertainment universe, producing official music projects, character theme songs, and fan-driven musical content that blends gufeng melodies with contemporary pop production. The game's music ecosystem has become a significant cultural phenomenon.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国游戏公司，旗下热门大型多人在线角色扮演游戏《剑网3》于2009年首次发布。此后该游戏拓展为多媒体娱乐版图，制作了大量官方音乐项目、角色主题曲及粉丝驱动的音乐内容，融合古风旋律与当代流行制作，其音乐生态已成为重要的文化现象。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who won Super Boy in 2013 at age 23. His vocal style is distinctive, and his stage presence is theatrical. His music blends pop, rock, electronic, and experimental elements, characterized by wide vocal leaps and intense emotional delivery. He gained wider recognition through Singer in 2018.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2013年以23岁之龄获得《快乐男声》全国总冠军而出道。嗓音极具辨识度，舞台表现充满戏剧张力。音乐融合流行、摇滚、电子及实验元素，以宽广的音域跳跃和强烈的情感表达见长。2018年通过《歌手》节目获得更广泛的关注。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who won The Voice of China in 2020 at age 18, one of the youngest winners in the show's history. Her voice is soulful and mature beyond her years, with natural vibrato and rich tone. She is known for emotionally nuanced interpretations of ballads and pop standards.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年以18岁之龄获得《中国好声音》年度总冠军，成为该节目历史上最年轻的冠军之一。嗓音深情成熟，颤音自然、音色丰富，超越年龄的音乐表现力备受赞誉。对抒情歌曲和流行标准的诠释细腻入微。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese band formed in 2012. Their sound is high-energy hip-hop and rock fusion, blending rap, electronic beats, and anthemic choruses. They have contributed extensively to Chinese film and television soundtracks, including theme songs for major action and sports films. Their music is characterized by motivational lyrics and aggressive, upbeat production.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国乐队，成立于2012年，音乐以高能量的嘻哈与摇滚融合见长，融合说唱、电子节拍和颂歌式副歌。为多部中国电影及电视剧创作配乐，包括大型动作片和体育电影主题曲。音乐以励志歌词和强劲有力的制作风格为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong Cantopop and Mandopop singer, actor, and TV host who debuted in 1994. His voice is smooth and tender, and his style is romantic ballads. He has released numerous albums across Cantonese and Mandarin. He gained wider international recognition through his role in My Fair Princess (1998-1999). He is also founder of ChillGOOD TV.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港粤语及华语流行歌手、演员及电视主持人，1994年出道。嗓音温柔流畅，擅长浪漫情歌，发行了多张粤语及国语专辑。1998至1999年因在热播电视剧《还珠格格》中饰演何书桓而获得更广泛的国际认可。他也是ChillGOOD TV的创始人。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the gufeng and fantasy music scene since the 2010s. Her voice is ethereal and flowing, well-suited to xianxia and wuxia storytelling. She has contributed vocals to game soundtracks, character songs, and online music projects, building a dedicated following within the digital music community.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于古风与玄幻音乐领域。嗓音空灵流畅，善于诠释仙侠与武侠题材。曾为游戏配乐、角色歌曲及线上音乐项目献声，在数字音乐社群中积累了忠实的听众群体。

Artist: 后海大鲨鱼 (Queen Sea Big Shark)
BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie rock band formed in 2004. Their sound is raw, energetic, and rhythm-driven, influenced by garage rock, new wave, and surf rock. Led by charismatic female vocalist Fu Han, they are one of the most iconic bands in China's underground rock scene. They have released multiple albums since the mid-2000s and remain influential in the indie circuit.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立摇滚乐队，成立于2004年，受车库摇滚、新浪潮和冲浪摇滚影响。由富有魅力的女主唱付菡领衔，音乐原始、充满活力且节奏驱动，是中国地下摇滚场景中最具标志性的乐队之一。自2000年代中期以来已发行多张专辑，在独立音乐圈中仍具影响力。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong-based singer who rose to fame in the 1980s with his warm, smooth vocal style and romantic ballads. He won the New Talent Singing Awards in 1983 and has since released numerous Cantopop and Mandopop hits. Known for his gentle stage presence and timeless love songs, he remains a beloved figure in the Cantopop golden era.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港歌手，1980年代以温暖流畅的嗓音和浪漫情歌走红。1983年获得新秀歌唱大赛冠军，此后发行了多首粤语及华语流行金曲。舞台形象温柔，经典情歌传唱至今，是粤语流行乐黄金时代深受喜爱的标志性人物。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame as the runner-up of The Voice of China in 2012. Her vocal style is bold and unconventional, with a distinctive raspy, powerful delivery. Her music blends pop, R&B, and electronic influences. She is recognized for her fashion-forward image and willingness to push artistic boundaries.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2012年因获得《中国好声音》全国亚军而走红。嗓音风格大胆、非传统，沙哑而富有力量感。音乐融合流行、R&B及电子元素。以前卫时尚的形象和勇于突破艺术边界的尝试受到关注。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese indie rock band formed in 2017 in Yilan County, consisting of Pan Yun-an, Tsai Hsin-lun, and Richard Lin. Their sound is laid-back, melodic indie with folk and pop sensibilities. They have rapidly become one of the most popular indie bands in the Mandopop scene. Hits include "Waves" and "Something I Don't Need".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾独立摇滚乐队，2017年成立于宜兰县，成员包括潘云安、蔡欣伦和林哲谦。音乐轻松舒缓、旋律性强，融合民谣与流行元素，迅速成为华语乐坛最受欢迎的独立乐队之一。代表作包括《海浪》和《我肯定在几百年前就说过爱你》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese folk singer and poet who has been blind since childhood. Active since the 1990s, his music features poetic, deeply introspective lyrics and a gentle, melancholic vocal style. He is a leading figure in China's independent folk scene, known for his literary approach to songwriting. His albums include The Silent Orchestra (2004) and The Promise of the Chinese Dream (2007).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国民谣歌手及诗人，自幼失明。自1990年代起活跃，歌词诗意而深具内省色彩，嗓音温柔忧郁。中国独立民谣场景的领军人物，创作手法极具文学性。专辑包括《沉默如谜的呼吸》（2004）和《中国孩子》（2007）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter and producer, widely regarded as the "King of Mandopop". He released his debut album in 2000, blending R&B, hip-hop, classical Chinese elements, and pop into a relaxed yet highly recognizable sound. He has sold over 30 million albums worldwide, won numerous Golden Melody Awards, and influenced generations of Asian pop artists. Hits include "Simple Love" (2001) and "Blue and White Porcelain" (2007).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手及制作人，被公认为华语流行乐天王"。2000年发行首张专辑，将R&B、嘻哈、中国古典元素与流行音乐融合，创造出轻松而极具辨识度的音乐风格。全球专辑销量超3000万张，多次获得金曲奖，影响了几代亚洲流行音乐人。代表作包括《简单爱》（2001）和《青花瓷》（2007）。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer with an ethereal, crystal-clear voice and extraordinary vocal range that blurs gender lines. He gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2014 and has since become one of the most sought-after vocalists in Mandopop. His music spans pop, classical crossover, and film soundtracks, including songs for Big Fish & Begonia (2016) and The Wandering Earth 2 (2023).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，嗓音空灵清澈，音域跨越性别界限，极为罕见。2014年通过《中国好声音》获得关注，此后成为华语乐坛最受欢迎的歌手之一。音乐涵盖流行、古典跨界及电影配乐，代表作包括《大鱼海棠》（2016）和《流浪地球2》（2023）的配乐。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who rose to fame as the runner-up of Super Girl in 2005. Her voice is distinctive and slightly husky, with R&B-influenced Mandopop style. She has released over 10 albums since her debut. Her music blends pop, R&B, and electronic elements with introspective, personal lyrics. She has also pursued acting and voice acting.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2005年因获得《超级女声》全国亚军而走红。嗓音独特、略带沙哑，风格融入R&B元素。出道以来已发行超过10张专辑。音乐融合流行、R&B及电子元素，歌词内省而个人化。她也涉足影视表演和配音领域。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2022. His vocal delivery is powerful and soulful, with a pop-R&B sensibility. He has built a growing following through live performances and streaming platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2022年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音充满力量、富有灵魂质感，风格偏向流行R&B。此后通过现场演出和流媒体平台积累了持续增长的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer of Mongolian descent. His voice is deep and resonant, and he incorporates traditional Mongolian musical elements into contemporary pop. Active since the 2010s, he has gained recognition for his unique timbre and ability to blend ethnic folk traditions with modern arrangements.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国蒙古族歌手，嗓音低沉浑厚，擅长将传统蒙古音乐元素融入当代流行音乐。自2010年代以来活跃，独特的音色和将民族民间传统与现代编曲相结合的能力备受认可。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and producer who gained prominence in the late 2010s through his work on Chinese film and television soundtracks. His vocal delivery is emotive, with a pop-rock sensibility. He has written and produced for numerous major artists and has appeared as a contestant on The Voice of China.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及制作人，2010年代末期因参与中国电影及电视剧配乐创作而崭露头角。嗓音情感充沛，风格偏向流行摇滚。曾为多位知名艺人创作及制作歌曲，也曾作为选手参加《中国好声音》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and actor who debuted in the mid-2000s. His voice is smooth and tender, and his style is romantic ballads. He has released multiple Mandopop albums and gained wider recognition through his acting roles in Taiwanese dramas, including Hanazakarino Kimitachihe (2006) and The Legend of Brown Sugar Chivalry (2007).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手及演员，2000年代中期出道。嗓音温柔流畅，擅长浪漫情歌，已发行多张华语流行专辑。通过出演台湾偶像剧获得更广泛认可，包括《花样少年少女》（2006）和《黑糖玛奇朵》（2007）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and entertainer. His music is playful, high-energy pop-rock with fast-paced hooks, humorous lyrics, and infectious melodies. He first gained fame as the lead vocalist of The Flowers in the late 1990s before launching a solo career in the 2000s. He is also a popular TV host and variety show personality.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及艺人，音乐活泼、高能量，以快节奏的旋律、幽默的歌词和洗脑的旋律见长。1990年代末作为花儿乐队主唱出道，2000年代后开始个人发展。也是受欢迎的电视主持人和综艺明星。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2021. Her voice is clear and emotive, and her style leans toward ballads and pop standards. She has released original singles and built a following through live performances and digital platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2021年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音清亮、情感充沛，音乐偏向抒情歌曲和流行标准曲目。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过现场演出和数字平台积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and musical theater performer with a clear tenor voice and emotive delivery. Active since the late 2010s, he has performed in major Chinese musical productions and contributed to television soundtracks. His music blends pop, musical theater, and ballad styles.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及音乐剧演员，嗓音清亮、情感充沛。自2010年代末期起活跃，曾参演中国大型音乐剧作品并为电视剧献唱原声带。音乐融合流行、音乐剧及抒情风格。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Singaporean singer-songwriter who made her debut with the album Yan Zi in 2000. Her voice is clean, direct, and emotionally transparent. She became one of the most beloved Mandopop artists of the 2000s. Hits include "Cloudy Day" (2000), "The Moment" (2003), and "Green Light" (2007). She has won numerous Golden Melody Awards.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 新加坡创作型歌手，2000年以专辑《孙燕姿》出道。嗓音干净、直接，情感表达透明而真挚，是2000年代最受欢迎的华语流行歌手之一。代表作包括《天黑黑》（2000）、《遇见》（2003）和《逆光》（2007）。多次获得金曲奖。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and rapper. Her style is bold and energetic, spanning hip-hop, pop, and R&B. She gained recognition in the late 2010s through online platforms and has since released original singles that showcase her confident delivery and catchy melodies.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及说唱歌手，风格大胆而充满活力，横跨嘻哈、流行及R&B。2010年代末期通过线上平台获得关注，此后发行了原创单曲，展现其自信的表达和抓耳的旋律。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2016. Her voice is warm and husky, with a folk-pop style. Her music features introspective, emotionally honest lyrics. She has released multiple original singles and EPs since her debut.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2016年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音温暖、略带沙哑，风格偏向民谣流行。音乐常包含内省而真挚的歌词。出道以来已发行多首原创单曲及EP。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and singer. His style is energetic and narrative-driven hip-hop. He gained mainstream recognition in 2019 with his viral hit "Old Iron's Love", which became a cultural phenomenon. His music often incorporates Northeastern Chinese folk elements and humorous storytelling.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手及歌手，风格充满活力，以叙事型嘻哈见长。2019年以热门单曲《野狼Disco》获得主流关注，该曲成为文化现象级作品。其音乐常融入东北民间元素和幽默的故事叙述。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer prominent in the gufeng and fantasy music scene since the 2010s. Her voice is ethereal and flowing, well-suited to xianxia and wuxia-themed storytelling. She has contributed to numerous game soundtracks, character songs, and online music projects.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于古风与玄幻音乐圈。嗓音空灵流畅，特别适合仙侠和武侠题材的故事叙述。曾为多部游戏配乐、角色歌曲及线上音乐项目献声。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer known for her soulful, powerful vocal style and emotionally charged ballads. Active since the 2010s, she has released albums under the name Xiao Xia, including the critically acclaimed Xiao Xia (2015) and Xiao Xia 2 (2021). Her voice is characterized by its rich tone and technical precision.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，嗓音深情而充满力量，擅长情感充沛的抒情歌曲。自2010年代以来活跃，以小霞为名发行专辑，包括广受好评的《小霞》（2015）和《小霞2.0》（2021）。音色丰富、技术精准。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Malaysian-born Chinese singer who rose to fame as a member of NINE PERCENT in 2018. His voice is a powerful tenor, and his style is emotional ballads. He has since launched a solo career with hits including "Our Time" and numerous drama soundtracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 马来西亚出生、活跃于中国的歌手，2018年因在生存类选秀节目《偶像练习生》中以第九名出道，成为男团NINE PERCENT成员而走红。拥有一副富有力量的男高音，擅长情感充沛的抒情风格。此后开展个人事业，代表作包括《我们的时光》及多部电视剧原声带。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and producer. Her voice is soulful and jazz-infused, and her music blends pop, R&B, and jazz elements. Active since the 2010s, she has released original singles and EPs. She has also worked as a producer and arranger for other artists.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及制作人，嗓音深情，融入爵士元素，音乐融合流行、R&B和爵士风格。自2010年代以来活跃，发行了原创单曲及EP。同时也为其他艺人担任制作人和编曲，在音乐行业中树立了多才多艺的形象。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter with a bright, flexible voice blending pop and R&B. She rose to fame in 2020 as the center of BonBon Girls 303 on Produce Camp 2020. She has since launched a solo career with hits including "Love, Existence" and contributed to major drama soundtracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，嗓音明亮而富有弹性，融合流行与R&B元素。2020年在《创造营2020》中以第一名出道，成为女团硬糖少女303的中心位，一举成名。此后开展个人事业，代表作包括《爱存在》及多部大型电视剧原声带。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer with a pure, tender tenor voice and sentimental ballads that defined Mandopop romance since the late 1980s. Dubbed the "Prince of Love Songs", he has released numerous classic hits including "Love Is Like a Tide" (1989) and "Faith" (1994). His music features emotional sincerity, elegant phrasing, and timeless melodic appeal.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，拥有一副纯净温柔的男高音，擅长伤感抒情歌曲，自1980年代末期定义了华语流行乐的浪漫风格。被誉为情歌王子"，发行了众多经典金曲，包括《爱如潮水》（1989）和《信仰》（1994）。音乐真挚动人、乐句优雅，旋律具有跨越时代的魅力。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer-songwriter who made his debut with Hins' First in 2001. His voice is smooth and expressive, with R&B-infused Cantopop. He has released numerous albums and won multiple music awards in Hong Kong. Hits include "Hurt No One" and "Puberty". He is also a sought-after producer and arranger.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港创作型歌手，2001年以专辑《Hins' First》出道。嗓音流畅而富有表现力，风格为融入R&B元素的粤语流行。发行了多张专辑并多次获得香港音乐奖项。代表作包括《断点》和《青春常驻》。也是备受欢迎的制作人和编曲家。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through Produce Camp 2021. His voice is youthful and emotive, with a pop ballad sensibility. He has released original singles and built a dedicated following through social media and streaming platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2021年因参加生存类选秀节目《创造营2021》而获得关注。嗓音青春感十足、情感充沛，风格偏向流行抒情。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过社交媒体和流媒体平台积累了忠实的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Malaysian Chinese singer who rose to fame in the mid-2000s with his warm, gentle vocal style and romantic ballads. His hit "When You're Lonely, Who Will I Be" became a signature track across Southeast Asia and Greater China. He has released multiple albums and pursued an acting career in Taiwanese dramas.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 马来西亚华裔歌手，2000年代中期以温暖温柔的嗓音和浪漫情歌走红。代表作《当你孤单你会想起谁》成为东南亚及大中华区的经典曲目。已发行多张专辑，并在台湾偶像剧中发展演艺事业。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who won The Voice of China in 2014, the show's first female winner. Her voice is husky and soulful, with emotionally charged ballads. She has become one of the most sought-after singers for Chinese television drama soundtracks. Hits include "A Little Bit" and numerous hit drama themes.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2014年获得《中国好声音》年度总冠军，成为该节目首位女性冠军。嗓音沙哑而深情，擅长情感充沛的抒情歌曲，此后成为中国电视剧原声带最受欢迎的歌手之一。代表作包括《年轮》及多部热播剧主题曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and member of Top Combine formed in 2007. His voice is clear and powerful, with emotional delivery. He released solo hits including "By My Side" and gained renewed recognition through Call Me by Fire in 2022. His music spans ballads, dance-pop, and rock.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2007年作为男团至上励合成员出道。嗓音清亮富有力量，情感表达充沛，个人代表作包括《棉花糖》，2022年通过参加《披荆斩棘的哥哥》重新获得关注。音乐涵盖抒情、舞曲流行及摇滚风格。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and actress who gained recognition in the early 2020s through musical competition shows. Her voice is clear and youthful, with a pop and ballad style. She has released original singles and performed in musical productions.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及演员，2020年代初期通过参加音乐竞演节目而获得关注。嗓音清亮、充满青春活力，音乐偏向流行及抒情风格。此后发行了原创单曲并参演音乐剧作品。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who won The Coming One: Girls in 2019. Her voice is deep and husky, and her style is singer-songwriter folk-pop with introspective, poetic lyrics. She has released multiple original singles since her debut.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2019年获得女性音乐选秀节目《明日之子水晶时代》冠军而走红。嗓音低沉、略带沙哑，风格为创作型民谣流行，歌词内省而富有诗意。出道以来已发行多首原创单曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who rose to fame as the runner-up of Super Girl in 2005. Her voice has extraordinary range, technical precision, and dramatic pop style. She has released multiple hit albums and performed internationally. Hits include "All the Way" and numerous film themes.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2005年因获得《超级女声》全国季军而走红。音域非凡、技术精准，风格偏向戏剧化的流行音乐。发行了多张热门专辑并在国际舞台上演出。2000至2010年代最成功的中国商业歌手之一，代表作包括《一路之下》及多部电影主题曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and actress with a distinctive, crystalline vocal tone and wide range. She rose to fame in the early 2000s with hits like "Invisible Wings" (2004) and "Over the Rainbow". Known for her resilience and powerful live performances, she has released over 10 albums. Her music spans ballads, pop, and dance tracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手及演员，嗓音独特、水晶般清澈，音域宽广。2000年代初期以《隐形的翅膀》（2004）和《Over the Rainbow》等金曲走红。以坚韧的个性和强大的现场表现力著称，已发行超过10张专辑。音乐涵盖抒情、流行及舞曲风格。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and key member of the influential hip-hop collective HHH. Active since the mid-2010s, his style is aggressive flow, lyrical dexterity, and performance-driven hip-hop. He has released multiple solo projects and collaborated with major figures in Chinese and international hip-hop.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手，有影响力的嘻哈团体HHH的核心成员。自2010年代中期起活跃，以激进的flow、词技和表演驱动的嘻哈风格见长。已发行多个个人项目，并与中国及国际嘻哈领域的重要人物合作。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter who won the Golden Melody Award for Best New Artist in 2010 and Best Mandarin Female Singer in 2018. Her style is intimate folk-pop with delicate melodic writing and emotionally honest lyrics. Hits include "Lost in the City" and "The Body".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手，2010年获得金曲奖最佳新人奖，2018年获得金曲奖最佳国语女歌手奖。音乐风格私密而温暖，旋律细腻、歌词真挚。代表作包括《失落沙洲》和《身骑白马》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and actress who gained recognition through Youth With You 2 in 2020. Her voice is sweet and melodic, with polished dance-pop performance. She has released original singles and built a following through variety shows and digital platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及演员，2020年因参加《青春有你2》而获得关注。嗓音甜美、旋律化，表演风格为精致的舞曲流行。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过综艺节目和数字平台积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer-songwriter who debuted in 2005, known for bringing R&B, soul, and neo-soul into Chinese pop. His style is groove-centered, with smooth vocal delivery and jazz-pop sophistication. Hits include "Love Song" (2007) and "Nothing's Gonna Change My Love for You" (2008). He has won numerous Golden Melody Awards.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港创作型歌手，2005年出道，将R&B、灵魂乐和新灵魂乐色彩带入华语流行音乐。音乐以律动为核心，嗓音流畅、编曲精致。代表作包括《Love Song》（2007）和《Nothing's Gonna Change My Love for You》（2008）。多次获得金曲奖。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and singer with an uplifting, clear, and forward-looking hip-hop style. He gained recognition in the 2020s through Rap for Youth and has since released original singles blending rap, pop, and electronic elements. His music touches on growth, ambition, and urban life.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手及歌手，风格积极向上、清晰而富有前瞻性。2020年代通过参与《说唱新世代》获得关注，此后发行了融合说唱、流行及电子元素的原创单曲。音乐常围绕成长、野心和都市生活的主题。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer, actor, and dancer. Joined TFBOYS in 2013. Solo music is known for conceptual depth and genre exploration. Album Liu Yanfen (2023) is a music novel blending jazz, Bossa Nova, waltz, indie rock, and ambient storytelling. Vocal delivery is gentle and narrative-driven.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国内地男歌手、演员、舞者。2013年以TFBOYS组合成员身份出道。个人音乐带有强烈概念性和叙事感。专辑《刘艳芬》（2023）被定义为音乐小说，融合爵士、巴萨诺瓦、圆舞曲、独立摇滚，嗓音温柔且带有叙事感。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and musical theater actor who debuted in the late 2010s. His voice is clear and emotive, with a pop, ballad, and musical theater style. He has released original singles and performed in major Chinese musical productions.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及音乐剧演员，2010年代末期出道。嗓音清亮、情感充沛，音乐融合流行、抒情及音乐剧风格的影响。发行了原创单曲并参演中国大型音乐剧作品。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who emerged in the late 1990s as a defining voice of Chinese folk-rock. His debut album I Am Going to 2000 (1999) and Life Like Summer Flowers (2003) became cultural landmarks. His music features poetic, introspective lyrics, melancholic melodies, and raw, emotionally honest vocals.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，1990年代末期作为中国民谣摇滚的代表性声音出现。首张专辑《我去2000年》（1999）和后续专辑《生如夏花》（2003）成为文化标志性作品。歌词诗意而内省，旋律忧郁，嗓音原始而真挚。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong Cantopop singer and actor who debuted in the 1980s. His live singing is precise, and his voice is smooth and expressive. He has released over 40 albums and won numerous music awards in Hong Kong. Hits include "Red Sun" and "Moonlight on the Lotus Pond". He is celebrated for his versatility across music, television, and hosting.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港粤语流行歌手及演员，1980年代出道，现场演唱精准，嗓音流畅而富有表现力。已发行超过40张专辑，多次获得香港音乐奖项。代表作包括《红日》和《月半小夜曲》。以其在音乐、电视和主持领域的多才多艺受到赞誉。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and actor of Korean descent, active since the 2000s. He debuted as a member of T.A.K.E. in 2003 before transitioning to a solo career in China. His voice is smooth and polished, with charismatic stage presence. He has released Mandopop singles and appeared in Chinese television dramas.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中韩双语歌手及演员，自2000年代起活跃。2003年作为韩国男团T.A.K.E.成员出道，后在中国开展个人事业。嗓音流畅精致，舞台表现富有魅力。发行了华语流行单曲并出演中国电视剧。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition in the early 2020s through online platforms and competition shows. His lyrics are emotionally honest, and his style is folk-pop with acoustic elements blended with modern production. He has released multiple original singles.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2020年代初期通过线上音乐平台和竞演节目获得关注。歌词真挚动人，风格为民谣流行，融合原声乐器与现代流行制作。出道以来已发行多首原创单曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through talent shows in the late 2010s. Her voice is sweet and melodious, with a pop ballad sensibility. She has released original singles and built a following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代末期通过参加选秀节目获得关注。嗓音甜美悦耳，风格偏向流行抒情。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and stage performer known for mastering nandan — male performers portraying female roles in Peking opera. He rose to fame in 2006 on CCTV Star of Outlook, blending traditional Chinese opera with Mandopop. His signature song "New Drunk Beauty" became a cultural phenomenon.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及舞台表演者，精于男旦"艺术——男性表演者演绎京剧女性角色。2006年通过选秀节目《星光大道》一举成名，将中国传统戏曲与华语流行音乐融合。代表作《新贵妃醉酒》成为文化现象级作品，展现其独特的声乐多样性。"

Role: singer and actor based in Taiwan
BriefArtistIntroEnglish: American-born singer and actor based in Taiwan, active since the 2000s. He debuted with his Mandarin solo album Shadow in 2005 and won the Golden Melody Award for Best Mandarin Male Singer in 2007. His style is warm, soulful R&B. Hits include "No More Love" and "The Promise".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 美国出生、活跃于台湾的歌手及演员，自2000年代起活跃。2005年发行首张国语专辑《影子》，2007年获得金曲奖最佳国语男歌手奖。音乐风格温暖深情，擅长R&B。代表作包括《不会爱》和《约定》。

Role: 脱口秀演员、喜剧创作者、影视演员、作词人、演唱者
BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese comedian, talk show performer, actress, lyricist, and vocalist. As lyricist: wrote lyrics for Wang Sulong's Before the Tears Fall and variety show theme songs. As vocalist: released film promotion songs. Singing style is sincere, unadorned, and full of emotional storytelling.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国脱口秀演员、喜剧创作者、影视演员、作词人、演唱者。作词方面：为汪苏泷创作《眼泪落下之前》，为综艺《五十公里桃花坞》创作主题曲《刚好》。演唱方面：献声电影《风平浪静》推广曲《敬你》（2020）和《无价之宝》推广曲《空荡荡》（2023）。演唱风格真挚质朴、充满故事感。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in the late 2010s. His voice is warm and resonant, with a pop ballad sensibility. He has released original singles and built a growing following through streaming platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代末期因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音温暖、富有共鸣，风格偏向流行抒情。发行了原创单曲，并通过流媒体平台和现场演出积累了持续增长的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese rock and C-pop singer who debuted in the mid-1990s. Her voice is distinctive and cool-toned, with alternative rock sensibility. She won the Golden Melody Award for Best Mandarin Female Singer in 2000. Her music blends rock, electronic, and pop elements with a fiercely independent artistic identity.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾摇滚及华语流行歌手，1990年代中期出道。嗓音独特、冷色调，充满另类摇滚感性。2000年获得金曲奖最佳国语女歌手奖。音乐融合摇滚、电子及流行元素，具有强烈的独立艺术身份。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer and actress who began her career after winning the New Talent Singing Awards in 1995. Her voice is emotive and heartfelt, with Cantopop ballads. She has released over 20 albums and won numerous music awards. Hits include "The Song of Women" and "Until You". She is also a celebrated film actress.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港歌手及演员，1995年获得新秀歌唱大赛后开始演艺生涯。嗓音情感充沛、真挚动人，擅长粤语流行抒情歌曲。已发行超过20张专辑并多次获得音乐奖项。代表作包括《少女的祈祷》和《再见二丁目》。也是备受赞誉的电影演员。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and singer who won The Rap of China in 2019. His flow is aggressive, his lyricism is technical, and his stage presence is intense. His music blends hip-hop, trap, and pop elements. He has released multiple albums and singles, establishing himself as a leading figure in Chinese hip-hop.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手及歌手，2019年获得《中国新说唱》年度总冠军。flow激进、歌词技术性强，舞台表现极具张力。音乐融合嘻哈、陷阱音乐和流行元素。已发行多张专辑和单曲，确立了自己在中国嘻哈领域的领先地位。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese Mandopop singer who rose to fame in 2007 on One Million Star with his rich, emotional vocal style. His voice is distinctive with a nasal timbre, and he is known for heartfelt ballad interpretations. Hits include "One Light" and "The Other Shore".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾华语流行歌手，2007年以歌唱选秀节目《超级星光大道》参赛者身份走红。嗓音丰富而富有情感，带有独特的鼻音音色，以深情的情歌演绎闻名。代表作包括《洋葱》和《其实都没有》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through youth music competition shows. His voice is youthful and energetic, with a pop-rock sensibility. He has released original singles and built a following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年代通过参加青年音乐竞演节目获得关注。嗓音青春活力，风格偏向流行摇滚。发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Singaporean singer-songwriter known for polished Mandopop craft, R&B color, precise melody, and emotionally clear songwriting. He debuted in 2003 with Music Voyager and has since become one of the most influential Mandopop artists of his generation. Hits include "The Dark Knight" (2013) and "Twilight" (2015). He has won multiple Golden Melody Awards.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 新加坡创作型歌手，音乐制作精致、融入R&B色彩，旋律精准、创作情感清晰。2003年以专辑《乐行者》出道，此后成为同代最具影响力的华语流行音乐人之一。代表作包括《黑暗骑士》（2013）和《不为谁而作的歌》（2015）。多次获得金曲奖。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and songwriter active in the Mandopop scene since the 2000s. His voice is smooth and melodic, and he has contributed to television soundtracks. He has released original singles and collaborated with other artists in the Mandopop industry.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及词曲作者，自2000年代以来活跃于华语流行乐坛。嗓音流畅、旋律感强，曾为电视剧原声带创作。发行了原创单曲，并与华语流行音乐行业的其他艺人合作。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese Mandopop singer who rose to fame as the champion of One Million Star in 2007. His voice is distinctive and dreamy, with emotionally charged pop and rock songs. He has released multiple critically acclaimed albums including Mystery (2008) and Fiction (2017). Hits include "Liar" and "The Natural Way".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾华语流行歌手，2007年获得《超级星光大道》总冠军而走红。嗓音独特而梦幻，流行摇滚歌曲情感充沛。发行了多张广受好评的专辑，包括《神秘嘉宾》（2008）和《美妙生活》（2011）。代表作包括《说谎》和《自然醒》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer with a crystal-clear, elegant high voice and masterful use of head voice and falsetto. He debuted in 1991 as the lead vocalist of Uki, and later launched a successful solo career. Hits include "Sword of Heaven" and "Single Lovers' Night". He is celebrated for his technical precision and classical vocal control.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，嗓音清澈优雅，精通头声与假声技巧。1991年作为双人组合优客李林的主唱出道，后开展成功的个人事业。代表作包括《你的样子》和《单身情歌》。技术精准、声乐控制力强，备受赞誉。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and online music creator active since the 2010s in the gufeng and pop crossover scene. His voice is warm and expressive, and he has released original singles and covers that resonate with fans of Chinese fantasy music. He also engages with his audience through digital platforms and live streaming.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及线上音乐创作者，自2010年代以来活跃于古风与流行跨界领域。嗓音温暖而富有表现力，发行了原创单曲和翻唱作品，深受中国玄幻音乐爱好者的喜爱。也通过数字平台和直播与听众互动。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the online music scene since the 2010s. Her voice is ethereal and flowing, with contributions to the gufeng and fantasy music genres. She has released original tracks and collaborated with other online musicians on game and fan project soundtracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于线上音乐圈。嗓音空灵流畅，为古风及玄幻音乐贡献了大量作品。发行了原创歌曲，并与其他线上音乐人合作游戏及粉丝项目配乐。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and rock musician who won The Voice of China in 2012. His voice is raw and gravelly, with guitar-driven rock style. He has released multiple albums including Liang Bo (2014) and The Edge of the World (2016). His music draws from classic rock, folk, and blues influences.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及摇滚音乐人，2012年获得《中国好声音》年度总冠军。嗓音原始粗犷，音乐以吉他驱动的摇滚风格为主线。发行了多张专辑，包括《梁博》（2014）和《迷藏》（2015）。音乐受经典摇滚、民谣和蓝调影响。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and lead vocalist of the legendary rock band Second Hand Rose, formed in 1999. His vocal style is distinctive and theatrical, incorporating Chinese folk and opera elements into rock music. He has become an iconic figure in China's underground and indie rock scene. His stage performances feature bold visual aesthetics and cultural commentary.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，传奇摇滚乐队二手玫瑰（成立于1999年）的主唱。嗓音独特而戏剧化，将中国民间及戏曲元素融入摇滚音乐，是中国地下及独立摇滚场景的标志性人物。舞台表演以大胆的视觉美学和文化批判为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer, actor, and dancer. Debuted in 2010 as bass vocalist of MIC boy group. First solo single Fly Away (2014) highlights low-range vocal strengths. Voice described as magnetic smoky voice, capable of ballads, rap, dance-pop, and Peking opera singing.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国内地男歌手、演员、舞者。2010年以MIC男团低音主唱身份出道。首支个人单曲《Fly Away》（2014）着重展现低音优势。嗓音兼具磁性烟嗓特质，能够驾驭情歌、说唱、唱跳快歌乃至京剧戏腔等多种风格。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2018 as a member of NINE PERCENT. His voice is clear and melodic, with polished stage presence. He has released solo singles and pursued an acting career in dramas and films since his debut.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2018年在《偶像练习生》中以第十名出道，成为男团NINE PERCENT成员而走红。嗓音清亮、旋律化，舞台表现精致。此后发行了个人单曲并在电视剧和电影中开展演艺事业。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who won The Coming One in 2017. His songwriting is plainspoken and observant, with a gentle, warm vocal delivery. His music captures ordinary loneliness and daily life with emotional honesty. He has released four studio albums to which he authored all lyrics and compositions.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2017年获得选秀节目《明日之子》冠军而走红。创作风格平实而敏锐，嗓音温柔温暖。音乐以真挚的情感捕捉平凡的孤独与日常生活。已发行四张全创作录音室专辑。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to prominence in the late 1980s as one of mainland China's earliest prominent pop singers. Her voice is rich and dignified, with a powerful ballad style. She has released numerous hit songs and remains a revered figure in Chinese pop music history.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，1980年代末期作为中国最早的一批著名流行歌手之一崭露头角。嗓音丰满庄重，抒情歌曲充满力量感。发行了众多热门歌曲，在中国流行音乐史上仍是一位备受尊敬的人物。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2016. Her voice is clear and pure, with an emotive ballad style. She has released original singles and contributed to television soundtracks, building a steady following through digital platforms.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2016年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音清亮纯净，抒情风格情感充沛。此后发行了原创单曲并为电视剧原声带献声，通过数字平台积累了稳定的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who made his debut with Dreams Come True in 2010. His music features clean pop melodies, youthful warmth, and easy-to-enter emotional storytelling. He has released 12 albums and contributed to numerous television drama soundtracks. Hits include "The Great Woo" and "Contradiction".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2010年以专辑《慢慢懂》出道。音乐以干净的流行旋律、青春温暖和易于进入的情感叙事见长。已发行12张专辑并为多部电视剧原声带创作。代表作包括《万有引力》和《有点甜》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and singer who gained recognition in 2020 through Rap for Youth. His flow is relaxed, his hooks are melodic, and his lyrics are introspective. His music blends hip-hop, pop, and electronic elements. He has released original singles and built a growing fanbase.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手及歌手，2020年通过参与《说唱新世代》获得关注。flow轻松、旋律化的钩子抓耳，歌词内省。音乐融合嘻哈、流行及电子元素。此后发行了原创单曲并积累了持续增长的粉丝群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer who rose to fame in 2010 as the runner-up on One Million Star. Her voice is warm and soulful, with emotional ballad interpretations. She has released albums and contributed to film soundtracks, including the critically acclaimed Faces (2023).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，2010年获得《超级星光大道》亚军后走红。嗓音温暖深情，擅长情感充沛的情歌演绎。发行了专辑并为电影原声带献声，包括广受好评的《明室》（2023）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who debuted in the late 1990s. His style is smooth, romantic ballads, and he released multiple albums in the 2000s. He reinvented himself with a more indie-folk sound in the 2010s. Known for his gentle vocal delivery and heartfelt lyrics, he remains a respected figure in Chinese pop.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，1990年代末出道，擅长流畅浪漫的情歌。2000年代发行了多张专辑，2010年代以更偏向独立民谣的音乐风格重新塑造自我。嗓音温柔、歌词真挚，在中国流行乐坛仍是一位备受尊重的人物。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition in the late 2010s through online platforms and talent shows. His voice is youthful and bright, with a folk-pop sensibility. His music blends acoustic elements with modern pop production. He has released original albums including Alien (2019).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2010年代末期通过线上平台和选秀节目获得关注。嗓音青春明亮，风格偏向民谣流行。音乐融合原声乐器与现代流行制作。已发行原创专辑，包括《我的名字》（2019）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through social media and streaming platforms. Her voice is sweet and melodic, with a pop-ballad sensibility. She has released original singles and built a dedicated following through digital content creation.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年代通过社交媒体和流媒体平台获得关注。嗓音甜美、旋律化，风格偏向流行抒情。发行了原创单曲，并通过数字内容创作积累了忠实的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and actress who debuted with Begin... in 2003. Her voice is sweet and youthful, with a signature "sweet pop" image that made her one of the most iconic Mandopop artists of the 2000s. Hits include "When You" (2004) and "Woo Hoo" (2005). She experienced a major career resurgence in 2022 through Sisters Who Make Waves.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手及演员，2003年以专辑《Begin...》出道。嗓音甜美青春，以标志性的甜蜜流行"形象成为2000年代最具标志性的华语流行艺人之一。代表作包括《当你》（2004）和《睫毛弯弯》（2005）。2022年通过综艺节目《乘风破浪》经历了一次重大的事业复兴。"

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and actor. Rose to fame in 2007 as a finalist on Super Boy. Voice is full-range — bright clear high notes, warm mid-range with gravelly texture. Music spans sentimental ballads, rock-infused pop, and narrative songs.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国内地男歌手、影视演员。2007年参加《快乐男声》获全国第七名出道。嗓音具有极高可塑性——高音清亮有金属质感，中低音温暖厚实带颗粒感。音乐风格横跨抒情慢歌、摇滚流行及叙事性作品。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and producer active since the 2010s. His vocal style is versatile, and he has contributed to pop and soundtrack music. He has released original singles and worked as a producer and arranger for other artists in the Mandopop industry.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及制作人，自2010年代以来活跃。嗓音风格多样，为流行及配乐音乐贡献了大量作品。发行了原创单曲，并为华语流行音乐行业的其他艺人担任制作人和编曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer-songwriter who debuted in 2005. Her voice is ethereal and delicate, with an art-pop sensibility. Her music blends Cantopop, indie, and classical influences, characterized by poetic lyrics and unconventional melodic structures. Hits include "Where's the Love" and "The Art of Love". She has won multiple music awards in Hong Kong.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港创作型歌手，2005年出道。嗓音空灵细腻，风格偏向艺术流行。音乐融合粤语流行、独立及古典元素，以诗意的歌词和非传统的旋律结构为特征。代表作包括《我真的受伤了》和《画意》。多次获得香港音乐奖项。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through music talent shows. His voice is clear and youthful, with a pop-rock sensibility. He has released original singles and built a following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年代通过参加音乐选秀节目获得关注。嗓音清亮青春，风格偏向流行摇滚。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through online music platforms. Her voice is sweet and emotive, with a pop-ballad sensibility. She has released original singles and built a dedicated following through streaming platforms and social media.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年代通过线上音乐平台获得关注。嗓音甜美、情感充沛，风格偏向流行抒情。发行了原创单曲，并通过流媒体平台和社交媒体积累了忠实的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the online music scene since the 2010s. Her voice is ethereal and flowing, with contributions to gufeng and fantasy music. She has released original tracks and collaborated with other online musicians on game and fan project soundtracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于线上音乐圈。嗓音空灵流畅，为古风及玄幻音乐贡献了大量作品。发行了原创歌曲，并与其他线上音乐人合作游戏及粉丝项目配乐。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer who rose to fame in 2001 as a member of S.H.E. She launched her solo career in 2010 with To Hebe, showcasing her ethereal vocal style and indie-pop sensibility. She has released multiple critically acclaimed albums and won Golden Melody Awards, including Best Mandarin Female Singer for Time Will Tell (2021).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，2001年作为S.H.E成员走红。2010年以专辑《To Hebe》开启个人事业，展现空灵的嗓音风格和独立流行感性。已发行多张广受好评的专辑并获得金曲奖，包括2021年凭借《无人知晓》获得最佳华语女歌手奖。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and actress, daughter of musicians Dou Wei and Faye Wong. She debuted in 2015 and has since developed a distinctive indie-folk and electronic-pop sound. Her voice is deep and laid-back, with artistic independence. She has released multiple EPs and albums, including Stone Café (2016) and GSG MIXTAPE (2020).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及演员，音乐人窦唯与王菲之女。2015年发行首支单曲出道，此后发展出独特的独立民谣和电子流行风格。嗓音低沉慵懒，充满艺术独立性。已发行多张EP和专辑，包括《Stone Café》（2016）和《GSG MIXTAPE》（2020）。

Artist: 简单对话 A Little Conversation (A Little Conversation)
BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie band formed in the 2010s. Their sound is relaxed and melodic, blending indie-pop, folk, and alternative rock. Their music features gentle vocal harmonies, introspective lyrics, and understated arrangements that prioritize emotional atmosphere.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立乐队，成立于2010年代，音乐轻松舒缓、旋律性强，融合独立流行、民谣和另类摇滚。作品以温柔的人声和声、内省的歌词和克制的编配为特征，注重情感氛围。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2019 as a member of R1SE. His voice is smooth and melodic, with youthful stage presence. He has released solo singles and pursued an acting career since his debut.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2019年在《创造营2019》中以第六名出道，成为男团R1SE成员而走红。嗓音流畅、旋律化，舞台表现青春活力。此后发行了个人单曲并开展演艺事业。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the online music scene since the 2010s, known for his work in the gufeng and pop crossover genres. His music draws from historical themes and traditional Chinese musical motifs, reinterpreted through modern production and melodic pop arrangements.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于线上音乐圈，以古风与流行跨界风格见长。音乐取材于历史主题和传统中国音乐元素，并通过现代制作和旋律化的流行编曲进行重新诠释。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2014. His voice is powerful and gravelly, with rock-infused pop style. He has released original singles and albums, including The Other Side of the Island (2020). His music features emotional intensity and raw delivery.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2014年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音充满力量、沙哑质感，风格为融入摇滚元素的流行音乐。发行了原创单曲和专辑，包括《给时间以时间》（2020）。音乐以情感强度和原始的演绎方式为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter, music director, and record producer who debuted in 2000. His style is R&B-infused Mandopop with a distinctive nasal vocal tone. He has released over 10 albums and won numerous music awards. He is also a sought-after producer and arranger, having worked with many top Mandopop artists.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手、音乐总监及唱片制作人，2000年出道。音乐风格融入R&B元素，嗓音带有独特的鼻音音色。已发行超过10张专辑并多次获得音乐奖项。也是备受欢迎的制作人和编曲家，曾与多位顶尖华语流行艺人合作。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese rapper and singer who won The Rap of China in 2018. His flow is melodic, his delivery is rhythmic, and he blends hip-hop with Chinese ethnic music elements. His music blends trap, R&B, and traditional influences with contemporary production.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国说唱歌手及歌手，2018年获得《中国新说唱》年度总冠军。flow旋律化、节奏性强，将嘻哈与中国民族音乐元素融合。音乐融合陷阱音乐、R&B和传统影响与当代制作。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Malaysian-born Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through singing competitions. Her voice is powerful and emotive, with a pop-ballad style. She has released original singles and built a growing following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 马来西亚出生、活跃于中国的歌手，2020年代通过参加歌唱比赛获得关注。嗓音充满力量、情感充沛，风格偏向流行抒情。发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了持续增长的听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer, former lead vocalist of the rock band Shin, active since the early 2000s. His voice is powerful with a high-range tenor, and his style is rock-ballad. He has released multiple solo albums after leaving the band. Hits include "The One" and "The Sea of Tears". His vocal style features intense emotional delivery and technical control.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手，摇滚乐队信乐团前主唱，自2000年代初期起活跃。嗓音富有力量、高音出众，风格为摇滚抒情。离团后发行了多张个人专辑。代表作包括《死了都要爱》和《离歌》。嗓音风格以强烈的情感演绎和技术控制为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition in the late 2010s through The Voice of China and Singer. Her vocal style is versatile and theatrical, with an art-pop sensibility. Her music blends pop, rock, and electronic elements with dramatic emotional expression.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2010年代末期通过参加《中国好声音》和《歌手》节目获得关注。嗓音多才多艺、充满戏剧性，风格偏向艺术流行。音乐融合流行、摇滚及电子元素，以戏剧性的情感表达为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and actor who debuted in 2002 with "I Believe" (the theme song for My Sassy Girl). His voice is warm and emotive, with a ballad style. He has released multiple albums and starred in films, including Cape No. 7 (2008).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手及演员，2002年凭借电影《我的野蛮女友》中文主题曲《I Believe》出道。嗓音温暖、情感充沛，风格偏向抒情。发行了多张专辑并出演电影，包括热门电影《海角七号》（2008）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie band formed in the 2010s. Their sound is atmospheric and genre-blending, combining indie-rock, electronic, and dream-pop elements. Their music features lush production, introspective lyrics, and ethereal vocal melodies, building a following in the indie scene.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立乐队，成立于2010年代，音乐氛围感强、风格跨越多变，融合独立摇滚、电子和梦幻流行元素。制作丰富、歌词内省、人声旋律空灵，在独立音乐圈中积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter known for his innovative blend of electronic pop, R&B, and traditional Chinese elements. He gained recognition in the 2010s through online platforms, and his hit "The Other Side of the Mountain" went viral in 2020, showcasing his distinctive production style and vocal versatility.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，以创新性地融合电子流行、R&B和传统中国元素见长。2010年代通过线上平台获得关注，2020年其热门单曲《囍》走红网络，展现了他独特的制作风格和嗓音的多样性。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who debuted in the early 1980s, known for his patriotic and folk-inspired songs. A frequent performer on China's national television, he has released numerous albums and remained a beloved figure in Chinese pop music for over four decades. His voice features a bright, clear tone and heartfelt delivery.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，1980年代初期出道，以爱国主题和民谣风格的歌曲见长。多次在中国国家电视台演出，发行了众多专辑，四十余年来在中国流行音乐中一直备受喜爱。嗓音清亮明亮，演绎真挚动人。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter who debuted in 2006 with 19. He is classically trained as a violinist and pianist, and his music blends pop, classical crossover, and R&B elements. His hits include "Can You" and "The Lonely One". He is known for his smooth vocal delivery and refined songwriting.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手，2006年以专辑《19》出道。拥有小提琴和钢琴的古典训练背景，音乐融合流行、古典跨界及R&B元素。代表作包括《我可以》和《寂寞，好了》。嗓音流畅、创作精致。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who debuted in 2006 and experienced a major career resurgence in 2015 through social media and variety shows. His style is theatrical melancholy with memorable hooks and confessional performance. Hits include "Actor" (2015) and "A Few Words" (2016).
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2006年出道，2015年通过社交媒体和综艺节目经历了一次重大的事业复兴。音乐风格偏向戏剧化的忧郁，旋律洗脑、表演自白式。代表作包括《演员》（2015）和《丑八怪》（2016）。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter known for her soulful vocal style and R&B, jazz, and soul influences. She rose to fame in 2012 through The Voice of China and has since released multiple albums, including TIA (2014) and 1212 (2022). She has collaborated with international artists and is known for her powerful live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，嗓音深情，深受R&B、爵士及灵魂乐影响。2012年通过《中国好声音》走红，此后发行了多张专辑，包括《TIA》（2014）和《1212》（2022）。曾与国际艺术家合作，以强大的现场表演著称。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie band formed in the 2010s, known for fusing traditional Chinese folk music with contemporary indie-rock and electronic production. Their music features traditional instruments, poetic lyrics, and atmospheric soundscapes, creating a distinct East-meets-West sonic identity.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立乐队，成立于2010年代，将中国传统民间音乐与当代独立摇滚和电子制作相融合。音乐以传统乐器、诗意的歌词和氛围化的音景为特征，创造了独特的东方与西方融合的音乐身份。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Singaporean singer-songwriter who rose to prominence in the 1990s with her melancholic Mandarin and Cantonese ballads. Her voice is cool and ethereal, with introspective lyrics. Hits include "City of Dreams" and "The Regret". She remains a beloved figure in the 1990s Mandopop golden era.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 新加坡创作型歌手，1990年代以忧郁的国语及粤语抒情歌曲崭露头角。嗓音冷静空灵，歌词内省。代表作包括《城里的月光》和《遗憾》。在1990年代华语流行乐黄金时代仍是一位深受喜爱的人物。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2006 as the runner-up of Super Girl. Her voice is powerful and versatile, spanning rock, folk, and pop. She has received critical acclaim for fusing traditional Chinese music with contemporary rock. Hits include "When I Think of You" and "Sky Song".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2006年作为《超级女声》亚军走红。嗓音充满力量、风格多变，横跨摇滚、民谣和流行。因将中国传统音乐与当代摇滚相融合而获得乐评界赞誉。代表作包括《如果有来生》和《乌兰巴托的夜》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2018 as a member of Rocket Girls 101. Her voice is sweet and energetic, with dance-pop performance. She has since launched a solo career with original singles and variety show appearances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2018年在《创造101》中以第六名出道，成为女团火箭少女101成员而走红。嗓音甜美、充满活力，擅长舞曲流行表演。此后开展了个人事业，发行原创单曲并参加综艺节目。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2019 as a member of R1SE. His voice is warm and melodic, with emotional ballad delivery. He has since released solo singles and contributed to television soundtracks.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2019年在《创造营2019》中以第十名出道，成为男团R1SE成员而走红。嗓音温暖、旋律化，擅长情感充沛的抒情演绎。此后发行了个人单曲并为电视剧原声带献声。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter who gained recognition in the late 2010s through The Voice of China. His voice is raw and soulful, with a folk-pop sensibility. He has released original singles that reflect personal experiences and emotional honesty.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，2010年代末期通过参加《中国好声音》获得关注。嗓音原始而深情，风格偏向民谣流行。发行了反映个人经历和情感真挚的原创单曲。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who won The Voice of China in 2019 at age 20. Her vocal style is unique and unconventional, with indie-pop sensibility. Her voice features a distinctive nasal quality and playful phrasing that sets her apart from traditional Mandopop singers.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2019年以20岁之龄获得《中国好声音》年度总冠军。嗓音独特、非传统，充满独立流行感性。鼻音质感鲜明、乐句处理俏皮，与传统华语流行歌手形成鲜明区别。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active since the late 1980s, one of the most influential voices in Mandopop. Her voice is powerful and rich, with emotive ballads. She has released numerous hit albums and served as a coach on The Voice of China. Hits include "Conquer" and "The Promise of the Season".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自1980年代末期起活跃，华语流行乐坛最具影响力的声音之一。嗓音富有力量、丰满厚实，擅长情感充沛的抒情歌曲。发行了众多热门专辑，并担任《中国好声音》导师。代表作包括《征服》和《白天不懂夜的黑》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2009 as the runner-up of Super Girl. Her voice is warm and clear, with emotional ballad delivery. She has released multiple albums and contributed extensively to television and film soundtracks. Hits include "The Way of Time" and "Flowing Light".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2009年作为《超级女声》亚军走红。嗓音温暖清亮，擅长情感充沛的抒情演绎。发行了多张专辑并为多部影视剧献唱原声带。代表作包括《时间煮雨》和《知否知否》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter with poetic, introspective lyrics and a folk-pop style. She gained recognition in the mid-2010s with her original singles and has since contributed to film soundtracks. Her music blends acoustic elements with contemporary pop, creating an intimate, storytelling atmosphere.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，歌词诗意而内省，风格偏向民谣流行。2010年代中期通过原创单曲获得关注，此后为电影原声带创作。音乐融合原声乐器与当代流行元素，营造出亲密的故事氛围。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2010s through talent shows. Her voice is bright and melodic, with a pop sensibility. She has released original singles and built a following through streaming platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代通过参加选秀节目获得关注。嗓音清亮、旋律化，风格偏向流行。发行了原创单曲，并通过流媒体平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie band formed in the 2010s. Their sound is upbeat, melodic indie-pop with retro and dream-pop influences. Their music features catchy guitar riffs, smooth vocal harmonies, and lyrics that evoke nostalgia and youthful longing.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立乐队，成立于2010年代，音乐积极向上、旋律性强，受复古和梦幻流行影响。以抓耳的吉他重复段、流畅的人声和声以及唤起怀旧和青春向往的歌词为特征。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer of ethnic minority descent. Her voice is bright and powerful, and she blends traditional ethnic music with contemporary pop. She gained recognition in the 2020s through singing competitions, showcasing a versatile voice that spans pop, folk, and world music influences.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国少数民族歌手，嗓音清亮有力，将传统民族音乐与当代流行相融合。2020年代通过歌唱比赛获得关注，展现了她横跨流行、民谣和世界音乐影响的多样化嗓音。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and actor who debuted in the early 2000s. His voice is warm and smooth, and he has contributed to television soundtracks. He has released albums and singles. He is also one of China's most recognizable actors, with starring roles in major television dramas.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及演员，2000年代初期出道。嗓音温暖流畅，为电视剧原声带贡献了大量作品。发行了专辑和单曲。也是中国最具知名度的演员之一，在多部大型电视剧中担任主演。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer active in the online music scene since the 2010s. His voice is deep and resonant, with contributions to the gufeng and fantasy music genres. He has released original tracks and collaborated with other online musicians on game soundtracks and fan projects.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，自2010年代以来活跃于线上音乐圈。嗓音低沉富有共鸣，为古风及玄幻音乐贡献了大量作品。发行了原创歌曲，并与其他线上音乐人合作游戏配乐及粉丝项目。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer and online music creator active in the 2010s and 2020s. His vocal style is versatile, and he has contributed to pop and soundtrack music. He has released original singles and collaborated with other artists in the Mandopop industry.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手及线上音乐创作者，活跃于2010至2020年代。嗓音风格多样，为流行及配乐音乐贡献了大量作品。发行了原创单曲，并与华语流行音乐行业的其他艺人合作。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in 2014. Her voice is powerful and explosive, with a pop-rock style. She has released original singles and contributed to film soundtracks. Her voice features a wide range and emotional intensity.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2014年因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音充满力量、极具爆发力，风格偏向流行摇滚。此后发行了原创单曲并为电影原声带献声。音域宽广、情感饱满。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in 2020 as a member of BonBon Girls 303. Her voice is clear and powerful, with emotional ballad delivery. She has launched a solo career with original singles and soundtrack contributions.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年在《创造营2020》中以第四名出道，成为女团硬糖少女303成员而走红。嗓音清亮有力，擅长情感充沛的抒情演绎。此后开展个人事业，发行原创单曲并为原声带献声。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Hong Kong singer and actor, one of the most popular and influential voices in Cantopop and Mandopop. Debuting in 1995, his conversational singing style makes lyrics feel lived-in rather than performed. Hits include "K歌之王" (2000), "十年" (2003), and "The Lonely Grain" (2010). He has won numerous Golden Melody Awards.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 香港歌手及演员，粤语及华语流行乐坛最具影响力和最受欢迎的歌手之一。1995年出道，演唱风格如同对话般自然，让歌词听起来像是生活的真实记录而非表演。代表作包括《K歌之王》（2000）、《十年》（2003）和《孤独患者》（2010）。多次获得金曲奖。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter with a dreamy, retro-infused pop sound and poetic lyrics. She gained recognition in the late 2010s through online platforms, blending indie-pop, folk, and jazz influences. Her music creates an intimate, nostalgic atmosphere with warm vocal delivery and sophisticated arrangements.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手，音乐梦幻、复古，歌词富有诗意。2010年代末期通过线上平台获得关注，融合独立流行、民谣和爵士元素。嗓音温暖、编曲精致，营造出亲密而怀旧的氛围。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who won Super Boy in 2007. His voice is warm and clear, with a folk-pop sensibility. He has released multiple albums and contributed to television soundtracks. Hits include "The One" and "Where Are You". His voice features sincerity and understated emotional power.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2007年获得《快乐男声》全国总冠军。嗓音温暖清亮，风格偏向民谣流行。发行了多张专辑并为电视剧原声带献声。代表作包括《有没有人告诉你》和《经过》。嗓音真挚，情感含蓄而有力。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer and actor who rose to fame in 2018 as a member of NINE PERCENT. His voice is warm and youthful, with charming stage presence. He launched a solo career with his debut single "我是你的" in 2018.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾歌手及演员，2018年在《偶像练习生》中以第二名出道，成为男团NINE PERCENT成员而走红。嗓音温暖青春，舞台表现富有魅力。此后于2018年以首支单曲《我是你的》开展个人事业。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie folk singer-songwriter who rose to fame in the mid-2010s with her distinctive, poetic lyrics and eclectic musical style. Her music blends folk, indie-pop, and rock elements, with a deep, expressive voice and unconventional song structures. She is one of the most influential independent musicians in the Chinese music scene.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立民谣创作型歌手，2010年代中期以独特的诗意歌词和折衷的音乐风格走红。音乐融合民谣、独立流行和摇滚元素，嗓音低沉富有表现力，歌曲结构不拘一格。是中国音乐圈最具影响力的独立音乐人之一。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer-songwriter and producer known for his work on film and television soundtracks. Active since the 2010s, he has composed and performed music for major Chinese productions. His vocal style is warm and emotive, often carrying the dramatic weight required for cinematic scoring.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国创作型歌手及制作人，以电影及电视剧原声带创作见长。自2010年代以来活跃，为中国大型制作项目创作并演唱音乐。嗓音温暖而情感充沛，常承载电影配乐所需的戏剧性张力。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese indie rock band formed in the 2010s. Their sound is guitar-driven with youthful release and live-band energy. They blend alternative rock, post-punk, and melodic pop elements with raw, emotive lyrics, positioning themselves firmly in the Chinese indie rock scene.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国独立摇滚乐队，成立于2010年代，音乐以吉他驱动、充满青春释放感和现场乐队能量。融合另类摇滚、后朋克和旋律性流行元素，配以原始而情感充沛的歌词，在中国独立摇滚场景中占据重要位置。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition through The Voice of China in the late 2010s. Her voice is warm and rich, with a pop-ballad sensibility. She has released original singles and built a following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代末期因参加《中国好声音》而获得关注。嗓音温暖丰富，风格偏向流行抒情。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Taiwanese singer-songwriter who first gained recognition as the lead vocalist of Natural Q in the mid-2000s. Her voice is quirky and ethereal, with indie-pop songwriting. She has released multiple solo albums and won the Golden Melody Award for Best Mandarin Female Singer in 2020. Hits include "Don't Be Afraid" and "The Color of the Night".
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 台湾创作型歌手，2000年代中期作为独立乐队自然卷的主唱首次获得关注。嗓音独特而空灵，创作风格偏向独立流行。发行了多张个人专辑，并于2020年获得金曲奖最佳华语女歌手奖。代表作包括《你啊你啊》和《末路狂花》。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who rose to fame in the 2010s through Singer. Her voice has extraordinary range and powerful, soulful delivery. It is one of the most technically acclaimed voices in Mandopop, spanning multiple octaves with incredible control and emotional depth.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2010年代通过参加《歌手》节目走红。音域非凡、演唱充满力量与深情。是华语流行乐坛最受技术赞誉的声音之一，横跨多个八度，控制力惊人且情感深厚。

BriefArtistIntroEnglish: Chinese singer who gained recognition in the 2020s through youth music competition shows. His voice is youthful and energetic, with a pop-rock sensibility. He has released original singles and built a following through digital platforms and live performances.
BriefArtistIntroChinese: 中国歌手，2020年代通过参加青年音乐竞演节目获得关注。嗓音青春活力，风格偏向流行摇滚。此后发行了原创单曲，并通过数字平台和现场演出积累了听众群体。
